economic_notes: Council has Akwesasne Harbour Development Corporation and Cornwall-Akwesasne Harbour Partnership as government business enterprises. Fiber to the Home Project underway. Various infrastructure construction projects ongoing.
notes: Akwesasne spans Ontario/Quebec border; province listed as ON based on auditor location and primary jurisdiction. ISC deferred revenue was $29,147,767. Large portfolio investments of $363M suggesting Dundee Land Claim settlement funds from prior year (2021 cash flows show $236.8M Dundee Land Claim Receivable). Infrastructure & Housing expenses of $10,410,681 included under expenses_housing. Segments: Akwesasne Mohawk Police Service $10,142,705; Economic Development $1,434,937; Executive Services $4,914,627; Justice $1,528,856; Mohawk Government $2,805,781 not mapped to standard categories. Schedules 1-6 are unaudited supplementary information. Pension expense $2,672,921. Subsidiary: Akweks:kowa Corp fully consolidated. GBEs: Akwesasne Harbour Development Corporation and Cornwall-Akwesasne Harbour Partnership on modified equity basis.
